_comment: Primary keyword -> canonical URL assignments for clusters A, B, C, F, G, H per Task 2. Scoped to the consolidation clusters only -- the full 51-post corpus index used by the Task 4 cannibalization gate is built separately (scripts/build_corpus_index.py). No search-volume data source is wired in; keywords here are inferred from live title/meta/content, not measured.

A.primary_keyword: best money transfer apps for immigrants

/best-way-to-send-money-usa-to-canada-20.role: USA corridor page, sibling of the future India/Philippines/Mexico corridor pages (Task 3 briefs 04-06)
/best-way-to-send-money-usa-to-canada-20.primary_keyword: send money from usa to canada

explicitly_not_touched.reason: DECISION 2, 2026-07-19: distinct origin market (money leaving Canada, not the USA), separate cluster by design -- do not merge with the USA pillar or its corridor spokes. No canonical reassignment, no action.
explicitly_not_touched.internal_cluster_resolution: RESOLVED 2026-07-19 (task1-decision-aadj-backlink-check.md): KEEP BOTH, no merge within the cluster either. Distinct-intent check passed for wise-vs-remitly-canada-2026 (dedicated head-to-head, 8 internal links vs the roundup's 5, older, longer at 8,917 words) -- the opposite result from the rbc-vs-scotiabank-vs-td check in Cluster F, which failed the same test and got merged.
explicitly_not_touched.primary_keyword_roundup: best money transfer apps from canada

B.decision: CONFIRMED, weak signal (backlink check 2026-07-19, task1-decision-bfg-backlink-check.md) -- 7 internal links / 2026-06-14 publish (open-bank-account) vs 8 internal links / 2026-06-22 publish (banks-newcomers-usa). Close to a tie; kept on scope grounds (broader roundup = canonical), not a decisive link-count gap like Cluster C or F.

C.decision: CONSOLIDATE, corrected 2026-07-19 (supersedes the same-day RE-SCOPE call) -- see task1-decision1-backlink-check.md: best-credit-cards-for-newcomers-usa-2026 has 6 internal inbound links + is older/more indexed + its title tag already targets 'No SSN Needed', vs. 0 internal links on the other page. Consolidating into the stronger, already-linked asset avoids orphaning link equity.
C.primary_keyword: credit cards for itin holders / no ssn
C.pre_redirect_action: graft any card/brand named only in the no-ssn page's content into the canonical page before redirecting, so no unique content is lost

F.decision: CONFIRMED, strongest signal of the 4 clusters checked (backlink check 2026-07-19) -- 19 internal links / published 2026-03-05 (4 months older than either competitor) vs 1 link each for the two absorbed pages.
F.distinct_intent_check: rbc-vs-scotiabank-vs-td-newcomers-canada-2026 checked for a genuinely separate comparison-query intent (not defaulted to merge) -- rejected: canonical's own SEO title already claims the same 3-way comparison, source has only 1 internal link and is thin (1,244 words). Merge confirmed.

kept_distinct./student-bank-account-canada-newcomers-2: international student persona, distinct intent, no change

G.decision: CONFIRMED (backlink check 2026-07-19) -- 4 internal links / 2026-06-22 publish vs 1 internal link / 2026-07-13 publish. Consistent signal on both axes.
G.primary_keyword: best credit cards for newcomers canada

H.note: no merge -- all three pages kept as distinct intents per task1 audit. Registered here for completeness only.

entries.keyword: high interest savings accounts newcomers canada
high interest savings international students canada
entries.flag: title/meta are broken/generic -- needs a data-quality fix, unrelated to cannibalization
